title: Schema migrations 003 + 004 and full 10-personality seed
acceptance_criteria: Migration 003 (003_personality_signals_schema.sql) creates personality_configs table: id UUID PK DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), name TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL, display_name TEXT NOT NULL, group_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (group_type IN ('reference','learning')), entry_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (entry_type IN ('fixed_time','momentum_exhaustion','any_signal','sr_anchored')), management_style TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (management_style IN ('hold','roll','cut_reenter')), is_frozen BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE, phase INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, params JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()

Migration 003 creates straddle_signals hypertable: id UUID PK DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), time TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, underlying TEXT NOT NULL, signal_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK IN ('MOMENTUM_EXHAUSTION','SCHEDULED','PULLBACK'), atm_strike NUMERIC NOT NULL, spot NUMERIC NOT NULL, straddle_value NUMERIC NOT NULL, vix NUMERIC, raw_exhaustion_score NUMERIC, adjusted_probability NUMERIC NOT NULL, confidence_tier TEXT NOT NULL CHECK IN ('HIGH','MEDIUM','LOW'), expansion_pct NUMERIC, roc_decline_candles INTEGER, acceleration_value NUMERIC — then SELECT create_hypertable('straddle_signals','time',if_not_exists=>true)

Migration 003 also adds roc NUMERIC and acceleration NUMERIC columns to straddle_snapshots (ALTER TABLE straddle_snapshots ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS roc NUMERIC, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS acceleration NUMERIC) — historical rows get NULL values which is correct

Migration 003 creates personality_audit_log table: id UUID PK DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), personality_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES personality_configs(id), changed_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), changed_by TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'api', old_params JSONB NOT NULL, new_params JSONB NOT NULL, reason TEXT

Migration 004 (004_paper_trades_m2.sql) alters paper_trades: ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS personality_id UUID REFERENCES personality_configs(id), ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS parent_trade_id UUID REFERENCES paper_trades(id), ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS signal_id UUID REFERENCES straddle_signals(id) — all nullable (pre-M2 rows get NULL, documented in schema.ts comments). Migration 004 adds indexes: idx_paper_trades_personality ON paper_trades(personality_id), idx_paper_trades_parent ON paper_trades(parent_trade_id)

Migration 005 (005_personality_seed.sql) inserts all 10 personalities using INSERT ... ON CONFLICT (name) DO NOTHING — fully idempotent. Seed data per PERSONALITIES.md: Clockwork (is_frozen=TRUE, entry_type='fixed_time', management_style='hold', phase=1), Precision (entry_type='momentum_exhaustion', management_style='hold', params.min_probability=0.70, params.max_daily_trades=2, params.max_daily_loss=8000, params.entry_delay_secs=120, params.vix_max=25), Scanner (entry_type='any_signal', management_style='hold', params.min_probability=0.50, params.max_daily_trades=5, params.max_daily_loss=10000, params.entry_delay_secs=60, params.vix_max=30), Adjuster (entry_type='momentum_exhaustion', management_style='roll', params.min_probability=0.70, params.max_daily_trades=2, params.roll_trigger_points=70, params.max_open_legs=4, params.max_daily_loss=12000), Reducer (entry_type='momentum_exhaustion', management_style='cut_reenter', params.min_probability=0.70, params.max_daily_trades=4, params.cut_trigger_points=70, params.reentry_min_probability=0.65, params.max_daily_loss=10000), Blitz (entry_type='any_signal', management_style='roll', params.min_probability=0.50, params.max_daily_trades=5, params.roll_trigger_points=70, params.max_open_legs=4, params.max_daily_loss=15000), Levelhead (entry_type='sr_anchored', management_style='cut_reenter', phase=2, is_active=FALSE), Conservative Learner (entry_type='fixed_time', management_style='hold', params.learning_speed='conservative', params.min_samples_before_change=30, params.max_changes_per_cycle=1, params.max_change_pct=3, params.cooldown_days=14, params.max_daily_trades=1, params.max_daily_loss=5000), Medium Learner (same shape, learning_speed='medium', min_samples=15, max_changes=2, max_change_pct=6, cooldown_days=7), Aggressive Learner (learning_speed='aggressive', min_samples=5, max_changes=3, max_change_pct=10, cooldown_days=3)
A post-seed comment in migration 005 states: 'ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING ensures idempotency; re-running this migration leaves all 10 rows unchanged'

src/db/schema.ts updated with: PersonalityConfig interface (id, name, displayName, groupType, entryType, managementStyle, isFrozen, isActive, phase, params: Record<string,unknown>, createdAt, updatedAt), StraddleSignal interface, PersonalityAuditLog interface, updated PaperTrade interface (add personalityId: string|null, parentTradeId: string|null, signalId: string|null)
bun run migrate applies 003+004+005 cleanly from scratch on an empty DB and idempotently on a DB with 001/002 already applied
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
